systems.name: opencode session subsystem
systems.description: Per-session prompt assembly, LLM streaming, compaction, capability layer

containers.name: opencode daemon (bun)
containers.description: Single long-running process; serves sessions over Unix socket

containers.name: Session message stream
containers.description: Authoritative chronological record of messages + parts; carries `kind: context-preface` flag on user-role preface entries

containers.name: LLM provider API
containers.description: External LLM endpoint; honors ephemeral cache_control breakpoints (max 4 per request)

containers.name: Plugin host
containers.description: Hosts plugins that subscribe to chat hooks

components.name: PromptAssembler
components.description: Top-level prompt assembly entry. Replaces current join-everything-as-system[0] with a two-track output: static system block + context preface. DD-12.
responsibilities: Resolve (model, agent, account, role, AGENTS.md, SYSTEM.md) tuple per turn
Call StaticSystemBuilder to get system[] (size ≤ 1)
Call ContextPrefaceBuilder to get preface ContextPrefaceMessage (or null)
Splice preface message into outbound messages[] before user's first text on each turn
Trigger plugin hooks chat.system.transform + chat.context.transform

components.name: StaticSystemBuilder
components.description: Builds the pure-static system block (L1+L2+L3c+L5+L6+L7+L8). DD-12. Output is byte-deterministic given the input tuple.
responsibilities: Concatenate driver / agent / AGENTS.md / user-system / boundary / SYSTEM.md / identity in fixed order
Hash output for cache miss diagnostic (feeds C9)
Return zero-or-one system message

components.name: ContextPrefaceBuilder
components.description: Builds the user-role context preface message containing T1+T2 dynamic content, ranked slow-first per DD-1/DD-2/DD-4.
responsibilities: Pull preload parts (README summary, cwd listing) from PreloadProvider
Pull pinned skills + active/summary skills from SkillLayerRegistry
Pull `Today's date` from environment provider
Order: README → cwd → pinned skills → date | active skills → summary skills
Emit single user-role message with `kind: context-preface` metadata, content as multiple text blocks aligned with breakpoint positions

components.name: CacheBreakpointPlanner
components.description: Places ephemeral cache_control on 4 deliberate boundaries (BP1..BP4) per DD-3.
responsibilities: Identify static system message → mark its last content block (BP1)
Identify context preface message → mark its T1-end content block (BP2) and T2-end content block (BP3)
Mark final non-system message's last content block (BP4)
Skip BP3 if T2 segment is empty; never relocate

components.name: AnchorSanitizer
components.description: Wraps + softens compaction anchor body before persistence. DD-6.
responsibilities: Wrap body in <prior_context source="{kind}">…</prior_context>
Rewrite imperative-leading lines with 'Note from prior context: ' prefix
Preserve byte-deterministic transform (same input → same output)

components.name: IdleCompactionGate
components.description: Pre-checks conversation tail cleanliness before allowing idle compaction to insert anchor. DD-7.
responsibilities: Scan last N=2 messages for unmatched tool_use ids
Defer (return early with telemetry) when unclean
Pass through when clean

components.name: CapabilityLayerGuard
components.description: Distinguishes cross-account vs same-account fallback paths; throws on cross-account. DD-8.
responsibilities: Track fallback entry's accountId vs current request's accountId
Throw CrossAccountRebindError when different
Allow same-account fallback with WARN (existing behavior)

components.name: SkillAnchorBinder
components.description: Binds compaction anchor lifetime to skill pinning state. DD-9.
responsibilities: Scan compacted span for skill name references
Call pinForAnchor(name, anchorId) for matched active/summary skills
Embed skillSnapshot into anchor metadata
Call unpinByAnchor(oldAnchorId) when superseded

components.name: CacheMissDiagnostic
components.description: Classifies cache miss as system-prefix-churn vs conversation-growth before allowing cache-aware compaction. DD-10.
responsibilities: Maintain rolling lastSystemBlockHash[] over last 3 turns
Compare current vs prior hashes
Return false + telemetry when churn detected; return existing decision otherwise

components.name: PluginHookRouter
components.description: Routes the new context.transform hook to subscribers; preserves system.transform. DD-11.
responsibilities: Fire experimental.chat.system.transform with static-only system[]
Fire experimental.chat.context.transform with ContextPrefaceParts
WARN-log dynamic content injected via legacy hook for one release

components.name: Telemetry
components.description: Emits new cache + compaction events per DD-13.
responsibilities: Emit prompt.cache.system.{hit,miss} (BP1 outcome from provider response)
Emit prompt.cache.preface.t1.{hit,miss} (BP2)
Emit prompt.cache.preface.t2.{hit,miss} (BP3)
Emit compaction.cache_miss_diagnosis with kind label

relationships.description: Sends request with cache_control on 4 breakpoints
Provides system block hash for diagnostic rolling window
Forwards to anchor write only when clean-tail check passes
Throws CrossAccountRebindError; PromptAssembler propagates to runloop
Annotates anchor metadata with skillSnapshot before sanitizer wrap
Reads SkillLayerRegistry pinned + active + summarized state

single-binary.description: All components compiled into the opencode daemon; no separate process
